title: NIIT Technologies South Asia Partners is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Principal)

jsonLd.title: NIIT Technologies South Asia Partners is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Full Stack Developer looking for your next big career move? NIIT Technologies South Asia Partners in Ranchi offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About NIIT Technologies South Asia Partners:
NIIT Technologies South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in TypeScript

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Professional development and training programs
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NIIT Technologies South Asia Partners!
